{{Quote|I see them Artoo! Don't worry... we'll beat the fighters down to the planet-!|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Children" />}}
'''Harix''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] that was a strong center of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Stafuv Rahz]] captured a [[Myoris Lin|Harix schoolteacher]] and a number of children to serve as bait for Rebel leaders. However, Rebels [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] led a rescue mission that saved them before fleeing the planet.

==Description==
A [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Harix system/Legends|Harix system]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]],<ref name="atlas" /> Harix was a [[Forest/Legends|forested]] world with several large [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges, including the [[Talhu Slotted Peaks]]. The Talhu peaks had several high passes, and the [[Shaelo Cliff]] was located nearby.<ref name="Children" />

==History==
Harix became a hotbed of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], with much of it led on the ground level by local schoolteachers. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was aware of this rebellious undercurrent, and placed a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on the world in an attempt to maintain peace and quiet.<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|II|19|Harix}}</ref> By [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the Imperial complement was led by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Stafuv Rahz]], a [[Gektl]] whom that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] received orders from the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to kidnap a Harix schoolteacher named [[Myoris Lin]], along with her class of children, in order to draw out several key Rebel leaders. Although Rahz and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] captured most of their targets, Lin's young son [[Berd Lin|Berd]] managed to escape and rally the support of Rebels [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Skywalker and Solo rescued Lin and her classmates, and Rahz was killed in the ensuing firefight when young Berd rewired his [[sonic beam projector]] to explode. With Vader himself launching [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] on their tail, the Rebels, Lin, and the children fled Harix for good.<ref name="Children" />

==Behind the scenes==
Harix first appeared in ''[[Bring Me the Children]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written by [[Don Christensen]] and released in [[1980]]. In the comic, the planet was illustrated by [[Russ Manning]].<ref name="Children" />
